final:
// // This module implements a 8-bit DRAM cell with read and write capabilities. It has a clock input, an enable input, a write enable input, an 8-bit data input, and an 8-bit data output. The data output reflects the stored value when reading, and should be updated with the data input when writing (when write enable is low).
module dram_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire enable,
    input wire we, // write enable
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
    reg [7:0] memory;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (enable) begin
            if (we) begin
                memory <= data_in; // Write data to memory
            end
            data_out <= memory; // Read data from memory
        end
    end
endmodule

It has a clock input, an enable input, a write enable input, an 8-bit data input, and an 8-bit data output. The data output reflects the stored value when reading, and should be updated with the data input when writing (when write enable is low).
